calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Frank A. D'Alfonsi, Esq. appeared with defendant and cross-complainant Deanna Jen DeLeon, who was placed under oath and testified, and for defendant and cross-complainant Elias DeLeon, who was not present at today's hearing.
No appearance by cross-defendants Rowena Jen, individually and as Trustee of the Lucy Jen Survivor's Trust, or Karene Jen.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on July 16, 2008.
Defaults were entered against the cross-defendants on March 7, 2008.
Does 1-10 in the cross-complaint were dismissed today, January 20, 2009.
The First & Second Causes of Action on the Cross-Complaint were dismissed with prejudice today, January 20, 2009 as to cross-defendants Rowena Jen, individually and as Trustee of the Lucy Jen Survivor's Trust, and Karene Jen.
The underlying complaint as to defendants Elias DeLeon and Deanna DeLeon was dismissed with prejudice on December 11, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court hereby Orders that a Declaratory Judgment on the Third Cause of Action be awarded in favor of cross-complainants Elias DeLeon and Deanna Jen DeLeon, and against defendants Rowena Jen, individually and as Trustee of the Lucy Jen Survivor's Trust, and Karene Jen, and that their claims against Cross-Complainants under the Promissory Note attached to the original complaint herein are null and void, and that there is no sum owing to the Cross-Defendants by the Cross-Complainants under such Note or otherwise.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Assigned To Trial Court
